# Prestigo

> Premium chauffeur service in Prague, Czech Republic. Airport transfers, intercity routes across Central Europe, corporate accounts. All-Mercedes fleet, fixed pricing, 24/7.

## Key Pages

- [Prague Airport Transfer](https://rideprestigo.com/services/airport-transfer): From €69, meet-and-greet, 60-min free wait, flight tracking.
- [Intercity Routes](https://rideprestigo.com/routes): Vienna (€485), Berlin (€580), Munich (€635), Budapest (€885), 30+ destinations.
- [FAQ](https://rideprestigo.com/faq): Booking, pricing, cancellation, vehicle questions.
- [Prague Airport Guide](https://rideprestigo.com/guides/prague-airport-to-city-center): Full 2026 comparison of all transport options from PRG.
- [Corporate Accounts](https://rideprestigo.com/corporate): Monthly invoicing, dedicated account manager, priority dispatch.

## Routes

- [Prague to Vienna](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-vienna): From €485.
- [Prague to Berlin](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-berlin): From €580.
- [Prague to Munich](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-munich): From €635.
- [Prague to Budapest](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-budapest): From €885.
- [Prague to Nuremberg](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-nuremberg): From €595.
- [Prague to Dresden](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-dresden): From €250.
- [Prague to Salzburg](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-salzburg): From €505.
- [Prague to Kraków](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-krakow): From €635.
- [Prague to Warsaw](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-warsaw): From €1,090.
- [Prague to Bratislava](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-bratislava): From €545.
- [Prague to Graz](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-graz): From €745.
- [Prague to Linz](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-linz): From €320.
- [Prague to Leipzig](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-leipzig): From €270.
- [Prague to Regensburg](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-regensburg): From €470.
- [Prague to Passau](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-passau): From €365.
- [Prague to Wrocław](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-wroclaw): From €470.
- [Prague to Ostrava](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-ostrava): From €610.
- [Prague to Brno](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-brno): From €340.
- [Prague to Zlín](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-zlin): From €510.
- [Prague to Olomouc](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-olomouc): From €460.
- [Prague to Karlovy Vary](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-karlovy-vary): From €215.
- [Prague to Mariánské Lázně](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-marianske-lazne): From €270.
- [Prague to Františkovy Lázně](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-frantiskovy-lazne): From €290.
- [Prague to Plzeň](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-plzen): From €150.
- [Prague to Liberec](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-liberec): From €175.
- [Prague to Hradec Králové](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-hradec-kralove): From €190.
- [Prague to Pardubice](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-pardubice): From €180.
- [Prague to Kutná Hora](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-kutna-hora): From €115.
- [Prague to Český Krumlov](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-cesky-krumlov): From €290.
- [Prague to České Budějovice](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-ceske-budejovice): From €255.

## Long-distance international routes

- [Prague to Amsterdam](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-amsterdam): 915 km, ~9.5 h.
- [Prague to Augsburg](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-augsburg): Bavaria, Germany.
- [Prague to Basel](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-basel): Switzerland tri-border.
- [Prague to Bern](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-bern): Swiss capital.
- [Prague to Brussels](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-brussels): EU institutions, ~10 h.
- [Prague to Cologne](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-cologne): Rhine valley, Germany.
- [Prague to Düsseldorf](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-dusseldorf): NRW business hub.
- [Prague to Erfurt](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-erfurt): Thuringia, Germany.
- [Prague to Frankfurt](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-frankfurt): Frankfurt am Main, ~5.5 h.
- [Prague to Geneva](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-geneva): Switzerland, ~10 h.
- [Prague to Hamburg](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-hamburg): Northern Germany port city.
- [Prague to Innsbruck](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-innsbruck): Austrian Alps.
- [Prague to Košice](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-kosice): Eastern Slovakia.
- [Prague to Milan](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-milan): Northern Italy via Brenner pass.
- [Prague to Paris](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-paris): France, ~11 h.
- [Prague to Strasbourg](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-strasbourg): EU parliament, French/German border.
- [Prague to Stuttgart](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-stuttgart): Baden-Württemberg, Germany.
- [Prague to Venice](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-venice): Northern Italy.
- [Prague to Verona](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-verona): Northern Italy.
- [Prague to Zürich](https://rideprestigo.com/routes/prague-to-zurich): Switzerland, ~9 h.

## Services

- [City Rides Prague](https://rideprestigo.com/services/city-rides): Hourly hire, point-to-point city transfers.
- [Group Transfers](https://rideprestigo.com/services/group-transfers): Up to 50 passengers, Mercedes V-Class fleet.
- [VIP & Events](https://rideprestigo.com/services/vip-events): Galas, private events, hotel-to-venue coordination.
- [Fleet](https://rideprestigo.com/fleet): Mercedes E-Class, S-Class, V-Class — full spec and pricing.
